summary: Iteration 28 - Complete testing of ticket customization features. All 10 backend tests passed. Frontend CompanySettingsPage verified with all required fields. Ticket print endpoint displays all customization (company name, phone, address, header text, footer text, QR code). 56 lotteries open out of 236 total. Vendeur commission default is 0%.

issues: React hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span> in table - minor HTML structure issue

context_for_next_testing_agent: All ticket customization features are working correctly. CompanySettingsPage at /company/profile-settings has all required fields: Logo upload, Company name, Phone, Email, Address, Ticket header text, Ticket footer text, QR code toggle. The ticket print endpoint /api/ticket/print/{ticket_id} displays all customization fields correctly including QR code. 56 lotteries are open out of 236 total enabled. Vendeur commission is 0% by default.

company_settings_page_ui.details: All form fields present with data-testid attributes: company-name-input, company-phone-input, company-email-input, company-address-input, ticket-header-text-input, ticket-footer-text-input, qr-code-toggle, logo-file-input, save-settings-btn, save-ticket-settings-btn

get_company_profile_api.details: GET /api/company/profile returns all 8 required fields: company_id, company_name, company_phone, company_email, company_address, ticket_header_text, ticket_footer_text, qr_code_enabled

put_company_profile_api.details: PUT /api/company/profile successfully updates all fields and changes persist

qr_code_toggle.details: QR code can be enabled/disabled via API and UI toggle

ticket_print_customization.details: Ticket print HTML includes: company name (LOTO PAM Test), phone (Tél: +509 1234-5678), address (Port-au-Prince, Haiti), header text (Bonne chance!), footer text (Merci pour votre confiance!), QR code (base64 image), status (VALIDÉ)

ticket_verification_page.details: Public verification page at /api/verify-ticket/{code} works correctly

vendeur_commission_default.details: Vendeur commission is 0.0% by default (from agent_policy.commission_percent)

lotteries_count.details: 56 lotteries open out of 236 total enabled lotteries

api_endpoints_verified: POST /api/auth/login - Company Admin and Vendeur login working
GET /api/ticket/print/{ticket_id} - Returns HTML with all customization
GET /api/device/config - Returns enabled lotteries and agent policy
